item.title: Comparing Robot and Human guided Personalization: Adaptive Exercise Robots are Perceived as more Competent and Trustworthy
PREC 2019: Personal Robots for Exercising and Coaching
Socially Assistive Robots for Exercising Scenarios. Studies on group effects, feedback, embodiment and adaption
Comparing the Effects of Social Robots and Virtual Agents on Exercising Motivation
PREC 2018. Personal Robots for Exercising and Coaching
Does the User's Evaluation of a Socially Assistive Robot Change Based on Presence and Companionship Type?
Exploring Embodiment and Dueling Bandits for Preference Adaptation in Human-Robot Interaction
A Framework for Sociall Assistive Tasks

item.title: A framework for designing socially assistive robot interactions
Applied Social Robotics—Building Interactive Robots with LEGO Mindstorms
Exercising with a Humanoid Companion is More Effective than Exercising Alone
Motivational Effects of Acknowledging Feedback from a Socially Assistive Robot
Long-Term Feedback Mechanisms for Robotic Assisted Indoor Cycling Training
Reusable Motivational Instruction Patterns for Socially Assistive Robots
A robot as fitness companion: towards an interactive action-based motivation model
How Socially Assistive Robots Supporting on Cognitive Tasks Perform
Effects of Different Robot Interaction Strategies During Cognitive Tasks
Social Robots for Long-Term Space Missions
